nasb.text: But certain worthless men said, “How can this one deliver us?” And they despised him and did not bring him any present. But he kept silent.

esv.text: But some worthless fellows said, “How can this man save us?” And they despised him and brought him no present. But he held his peace.

cnv.text: 但是有些流氓說：“這人怎能拯救我們呢？”就藐視他，也沒有送他禮物。掃羅卻沒有說甚麼。

ccb.text: 但有一些市井之徒说：“这人怎能救我们？”就鄙视他，没有送礼物给他，但扫罗没有说什么。
